description:
Design a solar window awning for a commercial storefront.

1. Model a vertical wall that is 6 meters wide and 4 meters high.
2. Create a window opening in the center of the wall: 3 meters wide and 2 meters high, with the bottom of the window 1 meter from the ground.
3. Model a sloped awning projecting from the wall, immediately above the window. It should be 3 meters wide, project outward by 1.5 meters, and slope downward away from the wall at a roughly 20-degree angle.
4. Use the Skelion plugin to insert standard rectangular solar panels flush on the top surface of the awning (0° tilt relative to the awning). Fit as many panels as possible.
5. Save the model to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\solar_awning.skp
